summary.shape_sentence: Early open volatility and morning liquidation into late-morning lows, followed by a steady afternoon recovery that closed positive but below the morning high.

goat.note: Largest clean impulse of the day: failed upper-range hold into sharp liquidation toward 27055.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish pivots were most effective after failed highs, especially post-10:00 and near the afternoon supply retest.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots worked best after demand held near 27020-27055 and again after the 13:30 reclaim.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 27180-27220 was briefly broken in the morning, failed, then acted as resistance again late day.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 27020-27055 was respected and became the base for the afternoon recovery.

time_markers.10am_blue: Price was near the upper morning range but unstable, preceding failed continuation and a larger selloff.
time_markers.12pm_red: Price was near the lower half of the session, rotating after the LOD and beginning to stabilize.
time_markers.2pm_green: Buyers controlled the tape after the 13:30 reclaim, with price trending higher.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed green near 27169.5, above the open but not near the HOD.

takeaway: Bullish close after a failed morning high and late-morning liquidation. Reference day for early supply rejection, defended demand near lows, and afternoon reclaim that recovered the session without closing near the high.
